name: EmptyState
description: Playful grayscale empty-state illustration shown inside a widget or panel with no content yet. Renders one of 34 self-contained SVG illustrations by set + type (18 HR Management, 16 Finance & Banking), with optional title/description/action slots for the common empty-state composition.
sourceNote: Ported from Figma nodes 3860:4495 (Empty States [HR Management]) and 3860:5822 (Empty States [Finance & Banking]). Each Figma type is a self-contained 148px illustration (light-gray circle + monochrome art); the SVGs were supplied locally under src/assets/Empty States/ (HR Management Widgets / Finance and Banking Widgets) rather than exported via MCP. Figma's per-widget type enum is collapsed into a runtime registry built from the glob keys — the `🧩 Type=<emoji> <Name>.svg` filename convention is parsed down to the clean `type` name. The title/description/action slots are not in the Figma illustration frames; they're optional and hidden by default, so the bare component reproduces the Figma illustration exactly while still supporting a real empty-state layout.
